nasb.text: before the sun and the light, the moon and the stars are darkened, and clouds return after the rain;

esv.text: before the sun and the light and the moon and the stars are darkened and the clouds return after the rain,

cnv.text: 日頭、光明、月亮、星宿變暗，雨後烏雲再現的時候。

ccb.text: 那时，太阳、月亮、星星都暗淡无光，雨后乌云再现；

csbs.text: 不要等到太阳、光线、月亮、星辰变为黑暗， 雨后乌云返回；
